properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued May 7 at 6:00PM CDT until May 7 at 6:45PM CDT by NWS Norman OK
properties.description:
* WHAT...A confirmed tornado.

* WHERE...Oklahoma County.

* WHEN...Until 645 PM CDT.

* IMPACTS...Life-threatening situation. Flying debris will be dangerous to those caught without shelter.
properties.instruction: TAKE COVER NOW! Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows. If you are outdoors, in a mobile home, or in a vehicle, move to the closest substantial shelter and protect yourself from flying debris.

properties.areaDesc: Lincoln County, OK; Pottawatomie County, OK
properties.headline: Severe Thunderstorm Warning issued May 7 at 5:30PM CDT until May 7 at 7:00PM CDT by NWS Norman OK
properties.description:
* WHAT...Sixty mph wind gusts and quarter size hail.

* WHERE...Lincoln and Pottawatomie Counties.

* WHEN...Until 700 PM CDT.
properties.instruction: For your protection move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a building.

title: Current watches, warnings, and advisories for Oklahoma
